name: @coverageunlocked/mcp-server
description: Insurance denial appeal intelligence. Get win probabilities, appeal strategies, payer insights, and regulatory leverage for any CPT code — powered by 20 years of insider knowledge.

tools.name: analyze_denial
tools.description: Analyze an insurance denial — win probability, denial reasons, appeal guidance for any CPT code

tools.name: check_denial_risk
tools.description: Pre-submission denial risk check — assess risk before submitting a claim

tools.name: get_appeal_strategy
tools.description: Full appeal strategy with counter-arguments, regulatory citations, and insider tips

tools.name: get_payer_intelligence
tools.description: Payer behavioral intelligence — denial tactics and counter-strategies

tools.name: get_regulatory_leverage
tools.description: State-specific regulatory leverage — appeal deadlines, prompt payment, parity enforcement
